title: Miden Debug Configuration
description: Configuration for the Miden VM DAP debug adapter exposed by `miden-client exec --start-debug-adapter`.

request.description: `launch` spawns `miden-client` and connects; `attach` connects to a server you started yourself.

scriptPath.description: Absolute path to the `.masm` script to debug (launch only).

midenClientPath.description: Path to the `miden-client` binary (launch only). When omitted, `miden-client` is resolved from `$PATH`.

pythonPath.description: Path to Python 3 used by the Zed stdio proxy. When omitted, `python3` is resolved from `$PATH`.

accountId.description: Account ID for execution (launch only, optional).

cwd.description: Working directory (must be an initialized miden-client directory; launch only). Defaults to the worktree root.
